description: French far-right anti-Arab militant group active from 1973 to 1987. Formed by veterans of the Organisation armée secrète, it targeted Algerian properties, businesses, and government offices in France. The group claimed responsibility for several bombings, including the 1973 Algerian consulate bombing in Marseille. Its status is inactive, with no members ever arrested.

country_links.evidence_quote: Their attacks were primarily centered on Algerian properties, businesses, and government offices.
country_links.context: The group attacked Algerian properties, businesses, and government offices in France, targeting Algerian interests.
